note: Phase 4a/4b back-half state, per repo (schema: ../../../../skills/sdlc-author-epic/references/state-schema.md). S03 is multi-repo (backend + mobile), in-build: one task shipped per repo through Phase 3's manual gates. EARNED to machine_advance: `checks` (Step B, Phase 4a) and `implement` (Step D, Phase 4b) — each has 5 runs at 100% approved-unchanged in trust-log.json, clearing automation.trust_threshold (>=5 runs, >=0.8 unchanged). So the next task auto-advances implement -> checks on a clean run and stops at engineer-review (locked, human). `spec`/`tasks` stay human_approve: they have NO earned evidence yet (Step C, gated until real runs accrue).
